description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Late, based on currencies, which include גדיד (cedid) and קרונה (the latter is likely the Spanish escudo minted as early as 1535 CE or the gold excelente minted first in 1497 CE). Cf. T-S AS 204.214 (same currencies, different scribe).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
